versions.changelog: v1.1.1.0: Maintenance, polish, and recap skip refinements. Split intro/recap toggles and fixed UI divider clashes.
v1.1.0.0: Added server-side settings sync, poster resolution badges, gamepad support, and security hardening against XSS and prototype pollution.
Initial Release: Modern UI replacement for Jellyfin. Features all the native functions with an updated look. Auto-playing trailers, skip intro/recap/credits, and custom HLS player.

overview: Transforms Jellyfin into a proper streaming service. Legitflix delivers a completely custom React frontend featuring a multi-user 'Who's Watching' profile switcher, a cinematic home screen with auto-playing Youtube trailers, a custom video player with native HLS support, Skip Intro/Recap/Credits buttons, and integrated subtitle search and downloading. It operates as a Zero-Flash UI replacement, loading instantly without showing the stock Jellyfin interface.
name: Legitflix
description: Complete UI replacement for Jellyfin. Native functions updated look. Auto-playing trailers, skip intro/recap/credits, and custom HLS player.
